title: Assistive Partner (AP) Managing Product - Functional Test Plan
overview: Comprehensive functional testing of the Assistive Partner Product Management Dashboard on the Y4J platform. This test plan covers navigation, status tabs, product listing table, search/filter/sort controls, actions menu, edit/update behavior, duplicate product, visibility control, delete functionality, data accuracy, permissions, UI persistence, approval process panel, and empty state handling.
author: Kiro Test Planner

linkedBugs.summary: Sort by Newest/Oldest First not functioning correctly
Incorrect submission date displayed as Jan 1, 1970
Disability Type field shows validation error
Mark as Active action fails to update visibility
Edit Pricing & Quantity fails to update product details

testCases.title: Access Product Management from Dashboard Navigation
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as an authenticated Assistive Partner
steps: Locate the Product Management navigation link in the sidebar/header
Click on the Product Management link
expectedResults: Product Management section is accessible from main dashboard navigation
Product Management tab is visibly highlighted when active
Dashboard loads successfully showing product listing
testCases.postconditions: User is on the Product Management page

testCases.title: Dashboard Loads Only Logged-in Partner's Products
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as Assistive Partner with existing products
steps: Verify product ownership by checking product details
expectedResults: Only products created by the logged-in Assistive Partner are displayed
No products from other vendors are visible
Product count matches the partner's actual product count
testCases.postconditions: Product listing shows only authenticated partner's products

testCases.title: Status Summary Tabs Display Accurate Counts
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with products in various statuses
steps: Observe the status summary tabs (All, Approved, Under Review, Draft, Rejected)
Count products manually in each status
Compare with displayed counts on tabs
expectedResults: All tab shows total count of all products
Approved tab shows count of approved products
Under Review tab shows count of products under review
Draft tab shows count of draft products
Rejected tab shows count of rejected products
All counts are accurate and match actual product counts

testCases.title: Status Tab Filtering - All Tab
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with products in various statuses
expectedResults: All products are displayed regardless of status
Product count matches the 'All' tab count
testCases.postconditions: All products are visible in the listing

testCases.title: Status Tab Filtering - Approved Tab
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with approved products
expectedResults: Only approved products are displayed
Products with edited changes pending review also appear (dual status)
Product count matches the 'Approved' tab count

testCases.title: Status Tab Filtering - Under Review Tab
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with products under review
steps: Click on the 'Under Review' status tab
expectedResults: Only products under review are displayed
Approved products with pending edit reviews also appear
Product count matches the 'Under Review' tab count
testCases.postconditions: Only under review products are visible

testCases.title: Status Tab Filtering - Draft Tab
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with draft products
expectedResults: Only draft products are displayed
Product count matches the 'Draft' tab count

testCases.title: Status Tab Filtering - Rejected Tab
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with rejected products
expectedResults: Only rejected products are displayed
Approved products with rejected edit requests also appear
Product count matches the 'Rejected' tab count

testCases.title: Dual Status - Approved Product with Pending Edit Review
testCases.preconditions: An approved product has been edited and edit is pending review
steps: Click on 'Approved' tab and note the product
Verify the same product appears in both tabs
expectedResults: Product appears in both Approved and Under Review tabs
Product shows 'Edited' indicator
Product retains Approved status until review is completed
testCases.postconditions: Dual status logic is working correctly

testCases.title: Dual Status - Approved Product with Rejected Edit
testCases.preconditions: An approved product has an edit that was rejected
steps: Click on 'Approved' tab and note the product
Verify the same product appears in both tabs
expectedResults: Product appears in both Approved and Rejected tabs
Product shows indication of rejected edit
Original approved version remains active
testCases.postconditions: Dual status for rejected edits is working correctly

testCases.title: Product Listing Table - Display All Required Fields
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with existing products
steps: Observe a product row in the listing table
Verify all required fields are displayed
expectedResults: Product image is displayed
Product name is displayed
Edited icon appears for edited approved products
Disability type is displayed
Available stock quantity is displayed
Listing status (Approved/Under Review/Draft/Rejected) is displayed
Website visibility status (Active/Inactive) is displayed
Submission date is displayed
Actions menu (three-dot) is displayed
testCases.postconditions: All product fields are visible in the listing

testCases.title: Status Indicators Visual Distinction
testCases.preconditions: Products exist in all status types
steps: Observe the visual indicators for each status
expectedResults: Approved status has distinct visual indicator (green border)
Under Review status has distinct visual indicator (blue border)
Draft status has distinct visual indicator
Rejected status has distinct visual indicator
Status labels/icons are clearly distinguishable

testCases.title: Color-Coded Left Borders for Product Cards
testCases.preconditions: Products exist in various statuses
steps: Observe product cards with different statuses
expectedResults: Blue border for Under Review / In Progress products
Orange border for Pending or Awaiting Documentation products
Green border for Approved products

testCases.title: Edited Icon Display for Approved Products with Edits
testCases.preconditions: An approved product has been edited and is pending review
steps: Locate an approved product that has been edited
expectedResults: Edited icon is displayed next to the product name
Product retains Approved status
Website visibility remains Active
testCases.postconditions: Edited indicator is visible for edited approved products

testCases.title: Pending Changes Section for Edited Approved Products
testCases.preconditions: An approved product has pending edit changes
steps: Expand or view the Pending Changes section
expectedResults: Pending Changes section is displayed
Submission date of changes is shown
Side-by-side comparison of Current vs New values is displayed
All edited fields show comparison (name, image, description, specifications)

testCases.title: Search Products by Product Name
testCases.preconditions: Multiple products exist with different names
steps: Enter a product name in the search field
expectedResults: Search field accepts input
Results filter to show only matching products
Partial name matches are included
Results update without page reload
testCases.postconditions: Search by product name works correctly

testCases.title: Search Products by Category
testCases.preconditions: Products exist in different categories
steps: Enter a category name in the search field
expectedResults: Results filter to show products matching the category
Results update dynamically

testCases.title: Filter Products by Disability Type
testCases.preconditions: Products exist for different disability types
steps: Locate the Disability Type filter dropdown
expectedResults: Filter dropdown displays available disability types
Selecting a type filters the product list
Only products matching the selected disability type are shown
Results update without page reload

testCases.title: Sort Products - Newest First
testCases.preconditions: Multiple products exist with different submission dates
expectedResults: Products are sorted by submission date in descending order
Most recently submitted products appear first
Sort is applied without page reload

testCases.title: Sort Products - Oldest First
testCases.preconditions: Multiple products exist with different submission dates
expectedResults: Products are sorted by submission date in ascending order
Oldest submitted products appear first
Sort is applied without page reload

testCases.title: Sort Products - Name A-Z
testCases.preconditions: Multiple products exist with different names
expectedResults: Products are sorted alphabetically by name (A to Z)
Sort is applied without page reload
testCases.postconditions: Products are sorted A-Z by name

testCases.title: Sort Products - Name Z-A
testCases.preconditions: Multiple products exist with different names
expectedResults: Products are sorted reverse alphabetically by name (Z to A)
Sort is applied without page reload
testCases.postconditions: Products are sorted Z-A by name

testCases.title: Filter and Sort Persistence
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page
steps: Navigate within the page (e.g., click on a status tab)
expectedResults: Applied filters persist until changed or reset
Sort selection persists until changed
Filters remain applied when navigating within the Listing page

testCases.title: Actions Menu - Open Three-Dot Menu
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with products
steps: Click on the three-dot (more) menu icon
expectedResults: Actions menu opens
Available actions are displayed based on product status

testCases.title: Actions Menu - Approved Product Actions
testCases.preconditions: An approved product exists
expectedResults: View Details action is available
Edit action is available
Edit Pricing & Quantity action is available
Duplicate action is available
Mark as Inactive action is available
Delete action is available
testCases.postconditions: All actions are available for approved products

testCases.title: Actions Menu - Draft Product Actions
testCases.preconditions: A draft product exists
expectedResults: All actions are available for draft products
View Details, Edit, Edit Pricing & Quantity, Duplicate, Mark as Inactive, Delete are shown
testCases.postconditions: All actions are available for draft products

testCases.title: Actions Menu - Rejected Product Actions
testCases.preconditions: A rejected product exists
expectedResults: All actions are available for rejected products
View Details, Edit, Edit Pricing & Quantity, Duplicate, Mark as Inactive, Delete are shown
testCases.postconditions: All actions are available for rejected products

testCases.title: Actions Menu - Under Review Product Restrictions
testCases.preconditions: A product under review exists
expectedResults: Edit actions are restricted as per system rules
View Details is available
Restricted actions are disabled or hidden
testCases.postconditions: Under review products have restricted actions

testCases.title: View Details Action
testCases.preconditions: A product exists
steps: Click on three-dot menu for a product
expectedResults: Product details page/modal opens
All product information is displayed

testCases.title: Edit Approved Product - Status Changes to Edited
testCases.preconditions: An approved product exists
steps: Click on three-dot menu and select 'Edit'
expectedResults: Edit form opens with current product data
Changes can be made to product fields
After save, product status shows 'Edited' indicator
Product retains Approved status
Website visibility remains Active
testCases.postconditions: Product shows edited state in listing

testCases.title: Edit Pricing & Quantity - Immediate Update
testCases.preconditions: An approved product exists
steps: Click on three-dot menu and select 'Edit Pricing & Quantity'
expectedResults: Edit Pricing & Quantity form opens
Price and quantity fields are editable
Changes save successfully
Stock and pricing updates reflect immediately after save
Updated values are visible in the product listing
testCases.postconditions: Pricing and quantity are updated immediately

testCases.title: Duplicate Product - Creates Draft with Suffix
testCases.preconditions: A product exists
steps: Click on three-dot menu and select 'Duplicate'
expectedResults: New product entry is created
New product has 'Draft' status
Product name has duplicate suffix (e.g., 'Product Name (Copy)')
All original details are retained except status and date
Submission date is reset to current date
testCases.postconditions: Duplicate product is created in Draft status

testCases.title: Duplicate Product - Rename Removes Suffix
testCases.preconditions: A duplicated product exists with suffix
steps: Change the product name to a new unique name
expectedResults: Product name can be changed
Duplicate suffix is removed when new name is given
Product saves with new name
testCases.postconditions: Duplicated product has new name without suffix

testCases.title: Mark Approved Product as Inactive
testCases.preconditions: An approved product with Active visibility exists
steps: Locate an approved product with Active status
Click on three-dot menu and select 'Mark as Inactive'
expectedResults: Product visibility changes to Inactive
Visibility status is updated in the table
Product is hidden from public catalog views

testCases.title: Mark Inactive Product as Active
testCases.preconditions: An approved product with Inactive visibility exists
steps: Locate an approved product with Inactive status
Click on three-dot menu and select 'Mark as Active'
expectedResults: Product visibility changes to Active
Visibility status is updated in the table
Product becomes visible in public catalog

testCases.title: Delete Product - Confirmation Prompt
testCases.preconditions: A product exists
steps: Click on three-dot menu and select 'Delete'
expectedResults: Confirmation dialog appears before deletion
Dialog clearly states the action
Cancel and Confirm options are available

testCases.title: Delete Product - Confirm Deletion
testCases.preconditions: Delete confirmation dialog is displayed
steps: Click 'Confirm' or 'Delete' button in the confirmation dialog
expectedResults: Product is removed from the listing
Product counts are updated
Success message is displayed

testCases.title: Delete Product - Cancel Deletion
testCases.preconditions: Delete confirmation dialog is displayed
steps: Click 'Cancel' button in the confirmation dialog
expectedResults: Confirmation dialog closes
Product remains in the listing
No changes are made

testCases.title: Data Refresh After Action
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page
steps: Perform any action (edit, delete, duplicate, etc.)
Observe the product listing and counts
expectedResults: Product counts refresh automatically after action
Listing data updates without manual refresh
No duplicate records are shown
No stale records are shown

testCases.title: Submission Date Display
testCases.preconditions: Products exist with valid submission dates
steps: Observe the submission date column for products
expectedResults: Submission dates are displayed correctly
No invalid dates (e.g., Jan 1, 1970) are shown
Date format is consistent and readable

testCases.title: Cannot View Other Vendor's Products
testCases.preconditions: Multiple vendors exist with products
steps: Log out and log in as Vendor B
expectedResults: Vendor A sees only their own products
Vendor B sees only their own products
No cross-vendor product visibility

testCases.title: Unauthorized Action Blocked
testCases.preconditions: User attempts unauthorized action
steps: Attempt to access another vendor's product via URL manipulation
Attempt to perform action on restricted product
expectedResults: Unauthorized actions are blocked
Appropriate error message is displayed
User is not able to view or modify other vendor's products

testCases.title: Approval Process Timeline Panel Display
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page
steps: Scroll to the bottom of the page
Observe the Approval Process Timeline panel
expectedResults: Panel titled 'Approval Process Timeline' is displayed
Standard product listing timeline (1-2 business days) is shown
Official AT listing timeline (3-5 business days) is shown
Notification note about email updates is displayed
Panel remains fixed at the bottom of listing results

testCases.title: Empty State - No Products Found
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page
steps: Apply a filter that produces zero results
Or search for a non-existent product name
expectedResults: Clear empty state message is displayed
Message indicates 'No products found' or similar
User understands no results match the criteria

testCases.title: Unauthenticated User Access Denied
testCases.preconditions: User is not logged in
steps: Attempt to access Product Management URL directly
expectedResults: Access is denied
User is redirected to login page
Dashboard is not accessible without authentication

testCases.title: Search with Special Characters
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page
steps: Enter special characters in search field (e.g., <script>, ', ", &)
expectedResults: Application handles special characters gracefully
No errors or crashes occur
No XSS vulnerabilities
Results show no matches or appropriate message

testCases.title: Search with Empty Input
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with search applied
expectedResults: All products are displayed when search is cleared
Filter resets to show all matching products

testCases.title: Edit with Invalid Data
testCases.preconditions: User is editing a product
steps: Open edit form for a product
Enter invalid data (empty required fields, invalid formats)
expectedResults: Validation errors are displayed
Form does not submit with invalid data
Error messages are clear and specific
User can correct errors and resubmit
testCases.postconditions: Invalid data is rejected with clear feedback

testCases.title: Page Load Performance
testCases.preconditions: Normal network conditions
expectedResults: Page loads key content within 3 seconds
Product listing is visible quickly
No significant delays in rendering

testCases.title: Error Handling - Network Failure
testCases.preconditions: Simulate network failure or server error
steps: Disconnect network or simulate server error
Attempt to load Product Management page
expectedResults: Clear error message is displayed
User understands there is a connectivity issue
Application does not crash
